description.ko: 장마비에 젖어 네온 디지털 생동감으로 고동치는 미래형 거대 도시의 낭만적인 비전입니다.
description.en: A romanticized vision of a futuristic megacity drenched in monsoon rain and pulsing with neon digital life.

prompt: A cinematic wide-angle shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Holographic Monsoon.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are draped in massive 3D holograms of geometric petals pulsing in #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan. Heavy monsoon rain creates vibrant, distorted reflections on wet metallic walkways and asphalt. Flying maglev vehicles leave long #FF6B35 orange light trails cutting through thick volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, ray-traced reflections, 8k resolution, capturing the romantic and melancholic soul of a futuristic megacity.
